# Audit&Fix

> Audit&Fix is a B2B conversion rate optimisation (CRO) service for small business websites. We score 10 key conversion factors (headline, CTA, trust signals, urgency, imagery, offer clarity, and more), annotate screenshots of every problem area, and deliver a prioritised fix list as a professional PDF report within 24 hours of payment.

Audit&Fix combines AI-powered visual analysis with human expert review. Every report is reviewed by a senior CRO analyst before delivery. The scoring methodology is calibrated across 10,000+ real business websites.

Pricing starts at US $297 / AU $337 / GBP 159, with a 30-day money-back guarantee. Follow-up benchmarking audits are available at 50% of the original price after fixes are implemented.

The service also offers Review Video production -- turning 5-star Google reviews into 30-second social media videos for local service businesses (pest control, plumbers, dentists, electricians, and more).

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.auditandfix.com/): Service overview, pricing, order form, FAQ, and testimonials
- [Conversion Audit](https://www.auditandfix.com/scan): Free website conversion scan tool
- [CRO Audit Comparison](https://www.auditandfix.com/compare): Feature comparison vs Hotjar, CrazyEgg, Google Lighthouse, DIY audits, and freelancers
- [Review Videos](https://www.auditandfix.com/video-reviews/): Video review service landing page -- turn Google reviews into social media content
- [Video Comparison](https://www.auditandfix.com/video-reviews/compare): Review video service comparison with competitors
- [Blog](https://www.auditandfix.com/blog/): CRO and conversion optimisation articles

## Services

- [CRO Audit Report](https://www.auditandfix.com/#order): 10-factor scored PDF audit with annotated screenshots, delivered within 24 hours
- [Review Video Production](https://www.auditandfix.com/video-reviews/): 30-second videos from Google reviews for social media posting
